title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Quinn Java Ltd
body: "Application number 5291  Applicant Oracle America, Inc objected to the name used by Quinn Java Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 6 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Quinn Java Ltd is changed to 16034476, Ltd. "
